prompts_findings.prompt_lead:
Read the files in this folder.

Tell me:
- what I can do with this folder in the fut

risks_fired.evidence: what I can do with this folder in the future — aspirational framing invites overstating the folder's capabilities beyond what the files actually evidence
risks_fired.fix_hint: Add an evidence-pin clause: 'Report only what the files actually show — no extrapolation beyond what you can quote from them' — keeps summary grounded in the real artifact state the student built.

risks_fired.evidence: Tell me: followed by four bullet questions — Claude may open with an acknowledgment sentence before listing; mitigated by 'Keep it to five bullets' hard constraint
risks_fired.fix_hint: Hard bullet-count constraint already suppresses preamble to low probability; no prompt edit warranted.

risks_fired.evidence: which rule or checking habit is most worth carrying — Claude evaluates worth of artifacts it helped produce; mitigated by fresh-session instruction in surrounding module body
risks_fired.fix_hint: Fresh-session instruction already in place; carve-out applies — self-audit-charity unlikely in cold-read context.
